_meta.note: RETROACTIVE CLEANUP 2026-07-18 (manual session with Magic, new §9a day-based PENDING expiry rule): sig-088 XAUUSD SHORT (Setup B, published trw2-newyork 2026-07-16 15:09 UK) marked EXPIRED and removed — reason: 'expired — reguła wprowadzona retroaktywnie 2026-07-18, setup przekroczył limit 1 dnia'. Bar-walk precondition satisfied: 8 documented checks (07-16 ny2 through 07-18 crypto-sat-am) all confirmed entry zone 4042.41-4050.74 never touched (max high 4032.36 on 07-17 16:00 UTC, ~10pts short); gold closed for the weekend since Friday 21:05 UTC (last 4017.315). Full expiry record appended to journal/results_log.jsonl (final_status: expired, rr_realized: 0 — no portfolio impact). Carried-over context for Monday Asia routine: (1) D1 bullish-rejection flag from Friday 07-17 (open 3979.265, low 3959.8, close 4017.315, close-position 89.8%, wick-rejection 30.4% — below the >60% §7d threshold in strict reading) remains unresolved — re-evaluate at Monday reopen for a formal swing candidate; (2) H1 CHoCH bullish confirmed ~4007-4009 (ICT Pro choch@4008.8 + LuxAlgo CHoCH@4007.3) with price holding above since — Monday's fresh XAU analysis starts from this bullish H1 structure, NOT from the expired SHORT thesis; (3) potential LONG pullback OTE zone noted 07-17: 3973.5-3984.3 (0.618-0.786 of 3959.8→4023.835) if bullish structure holds. NOTE FOR MONDAY: new rules active since 2026-07-18 — §9a expiry, 3+1 guarantee with confidence degradation, categorical D1/H4 ban for TOP3/XAU day trading, trailing SL on runner post-TP1 (§16).

scenario_schema.sl_update_direction_rule: reduce_risk_only: LONG -> new_sl > current_sl AND new_sl < entry_lower; SHORT -> new_sl < current_sl AND new_sl > entry_upper
scenario_schema.screenshot_m15_path_doc: Path to the §7b M15 standard screenshot. Must be <id>_m15_standard_<ts>.png with companion _meta.json (TF=15, has_entry_box, has_sl_line, has_tp_lines). Written by bar-walk after capture_screenshot. H1 or non-standard screenshots must NOT be stored here -- use null until §7b is run.

flags_doc.applied: set true once trigger fires -- prevents re-application
flags_doc.one_shot: always true -- each scenario fires at most once
flags_doc.disabled: set true by mutually_exclusive_with when a sibling fires
flags_doc.mutually_exclusive_with: list of scenario keys to disable when this one fires

scenario_schema.precondition_doc: optional -- a bar matching precondition type/level must appear BEFORE the main trigger bar (chronological order)
